headline: MARKET WRAP — Jun 3
telegramText: MARKET WRAP — Jun 3, 2026 Built for autonomous systems. Useful for humans. DAILY SYNTHESIS Markets closed with a clear divergence story as traditional growth sectors outperformed while crypto assets faced heavy selling. The semiconductor surge alongside utility strength suggests investors favoring quality over speculative plays. Tomorrow's focus turns to whether this rotation has legs or represents temporary repositioning ahead of key economic data.
